basics.name: Hassan Algasid
basics.label: AI Solutions / Forward Deployed Operator — Vertical AI (PropTech, FinTech)
basics.summary: Operator who directs AI to ship vertical-AI products end-to-end. Founder of HassTech LLC, currently shipping HT Calc, HassTech API, HTPdf, NeuronScope, HT Meter, HT Career, and HT Folio across PropTech and FinTech. Deep workflow with agentic coding tools — moves a brief to a deployed Cloudflare app in days, not quarters.

work.name: HassTech LLC
work.summary: Solo-founder building a portfolio of vertical-AI products on Cloudflare's edge. Operate as a non-coder forward-deployed engineer: scope products, direct AI agents to implement, deploy and iterate.
highlights: Shipped 7 production products across PropTech and FinTech in under 18 months — all on free-tier infrastructure (Cloudflare Pages, Workers, D1, KV, Pages Functions).
Run an agent-first development workflow with Claude Code, Cursor, and custom MCP servers — including a local-first AI usage proxy that meters spend across providers in real time.
Built reusable infrastructure (auth, basic-auth gating, contact pipeline, brand kit) that any new HassTech product inherits on day one.

projects.name: HT Calc
projects.description: Mortgage and real-estate calculator suite — interactive scenarios, amortization, affordability, and investor cash-flow modeling.
highlights: Original HassTech product. Edge-rendered, no backend dependency — works fully offline after first load.
Drives the brand-kit and auth conventions reused across the rest of the suite.

projects.name: HassTech API
projects.description: Suite hub and public API surface at hasstechapi.com — landing, products grid, contact pipeline.
highlights: Astro static site with a Cloudflare Worker contact endpoint that validates Turnstile and files GitHub issues for inbound leads.
Centralized brand and meta layer for every HassTech product.

projects.name: HTPdf / HTPrint API
projects.description: Edge-rendered PDF generation API with a brand-kit system for white-label PDF output.
highlights: Cloudflare Workers + Browser Rendering for sub-second PDF synthesis.
Brand kit layer turns one input into branded PDFs for any tenant.

projects.name: NeuronScope
projects.description: Visual scope for inspecting neural-network and agent behavior in real time.
highlights: Side-project tool for understanding model decision surfaces during product development.

projects.name: HT Meter
projects.description: Local-first AI usage proxy and dashboard. Meters spend, requests, and tokens across providers without sending data off-machine.
highlights: Runs on localhost:8080. CLI: `ht-meter start`. SQLite-backed.
Phase 0 shipped to internal use; Phase 1 adds shared team views over Cloudflare Tunnel.

projects.name: HT Career
projects.description: Free AI resume inspector and career concierge at career.hasstechapi.com.
highlights: D1 + Groq stack — sub-second resume scoring and rewrite suggestions.

projects.name: HT Folio
projects.description: Auto-generated developer portfolio at ht-folio.pages.dev — drop a GitHub username, get a deployable portfolio site.
highlights: Astro + Cloudflare Pages + KV. Tier 2 private-repo showcase live for select users.
Generated portfolios pull live README, language stats, and contribution graphs from the GitHub API.
